ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game ended */,
  "num_rounds" INTEGER /* Number of rounds in the game */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of the game (e.g., puzzle, strategy) */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the game */,
  "max_players" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players allowed in the game session */,
  "min_players" INTEGER /* Minimum number of players required to start the game session */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the game session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game session was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., player, moderator, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game session the round belongs to */,
  "round_num" INTEGER /* Number of the round in the game session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the round started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the round ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the round (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "round_type" TEXT /* Type of the round (e.g., puzzle, strategy) */,
  "round_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the round */,
  "round_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the round in seconds */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the round */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the round was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the round was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rounds_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the round the message belongs to */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game session the message belongs to */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the message */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the message */,
  "contents" TEXT /* Content of the message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message was sent */,
  "message_type" TEXT /* Type of the message (e.g., text, image, video) */,
  "message_status" TEXT /* Status of the message (e.g., sent, delivered, read) */,
  "parent_message_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent message (for message threads) */,
  "message_size" INTEGER /* Size of the message in bytes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_round_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the round the statistics belong to */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game session the statistics belong to */,
  "message_count" INTEGER /* Number of messages exchanged in the round */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Success rate of the round (e.g., percentage of correct answers) */,
  "average_response_time" REAL /* Average response time in the round */,
  "total_participants" INTEGER /* Total number of participants in the round */,
  "correct_answers" INTEGER /* Number of correct answers in the round */,
  "incorrect_answers" INTEGER /* Number of incorrect answers in the round */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistics were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_round_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_round_stats_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who participated */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game session the user participated in */,
  "join_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user joined the game session */,
  "leave_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user left the game session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's participation (e.g., active, left) */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the game session (e.g., player, observer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user session was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_game_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_game_sessions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
